answers.answer: C) The checkout page must load in under 2 seconds on a 3G connection. Non-functional requirement (performance). A, B, D are functional requirements.

LITERALLY: "Make website faster"
ACTUALLY: Diagnose and fix root cause of slow performance affecting sales. Inconsistent performance suggests infrastructure/CDN issue.
QUESTIONS: 1) Where are customers vs marketing team located? 2) What specific pages/actions slow? 3) What hosting/infrastructure, any recent changes?
